extension.summary: Scrape, cache and manually refresh library ratings, status and IMDb Top 250 movies/TV ranks
Scrape, cache, dan refresh otomatis rating seluruh library, episode, status, serta ranking IMDb Top 250 film/serial
extension.description: Scans Kodi movies, TV shows and individual episodes. Stores normalized and raw rating data from the Kodi library, MDBList, TMDb and OMDb in an independent cache. Stores rating cache independently, publishes cached values for Arctic Fuse 3, syncs IMDb Top 250 Movies through Kodi and IMDb Top 250 TV Shows from the bundled JSON, and fills Oscar/Emmy wins from OMDb Awards. Manual full-library scans are handed to the service and shown as a non-blocking background progress notification. Does not write to TMDbHelper private cache. Version 1.3.30 is rebuilt from the stable 1.3.27 base, keeps the original icon/package structure, adds bundled IMDb Top 250 TV Shows sync, simplified settings, manual-only scraping, and smart missing-only refresh from one provider response.

Memindai film, serial, dan setiap episode di library Kodi. Menyimpan data rating terstandardisasi dan data mentah dari library Kodi, MDBList, TMDb, dan OMDb dalam cache terpisah. Menyimpan cache rating secara terpisah, menyajikan cache untuk Arctic Fuse 3, menyinkronkan IMDb Top 250 Movies melalui Kodi dan IMDb Top 250 TV Shows dari JSON bawaan addon. Pemindaian manual seluruh library diserahkan ke service dan ditampilkan sebagai notifikasi progres latar belakang yang tidak mengunci antarmuka. Tidak menulis ke cache internal TMDbHelper. Versi 1.3.30 dibuat ulang dari base stabil 1.3.27, mempertahankan icon/struktur paket asli, menambahkan sync IMDb Top 250 TV Shows bawaan, settings sederhana, scrape manual-only, dan smart missing-only dari satu response provider.
